Yellow bumpy sponge

pgl

cj

skd

bb

Yellow horn sponge

Species are difficult to positively identify without close examination of internal parts.
On this website, they are grouped by external features for convenience of display.

Northern shores

pgl: punggol, prp:pasir ris park,chg: changi, cj: chek jawa including pulau ubin, skd: pulau sekudu, bb: beting bronok, tus: tuas, ecp: east coast park, tm: tanah merah

Southern shores

lab: labrador, snt: sentosa, cyr: cyrene reef, kus: kusu island, laz: lazarus island, sji: st. john’s island, sis: sisters islands, jng: pulau jong, tkr:pulau tekukor, hnt: pulau hantu, tpg: terumbus pempang darat, tengah and laut, smk: pulau semakau, tsm: submerged reefs off semakau - terumbu raya, beting bemban besar, terumbu bemban, terumbu semakau, rfl: raffles lighthouse, lfa: live firing area (Salu, Sudong, Pawai, Senang, Biola and submerged reefs in the area)
